rationale: Educ. Code §45.209 governs investment of school district funds in time deposits with savings and loan institutions. It has no relation to homestead exemption amounts or property tax appraisal under Tax Code §11.13(b).
quote: The school district may provide in its bid or proposal blank for the right to place on time deposits with savings and loan institutions located in this state only funds that are fully insured by the Federal Deposit Insurance Corporation.
_note: No conflict; rule_text concerns district fund investment, not homestead exemptions.
